title: State rep wants state to create a UFO study center
description: The bill is co-sponsored by Rep. Aundre Bumgardner, D-41st District.

title: Massive 3.8 Million-Page UFO Vault Mysteriously Deleted Hours After Trump Orders Classified Alien File Release
description: The Black Vault—the premier trove of declassified government documents on UFOs, secret CIA programs, crashed craft recoveries—suffered a catastrophic wipe just one day after President Donald Trump issued a bombshell [...]

title: FBI joins search for retired Air Force general, UFO expert missing for 2 weeks
description: A Silver Alert has been issued by the Bernalillo County Sheriff's Office in New Mexico as the search continues for William “Neil” McCasland, a retired Air Force major general who once had top-secret access to government UFO research and potential evidence. McCasland, 68, was last seen at his home on Quail Run Court in Albuquerque [...]

title: Disclosure Day Trailer: Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor Fight Mysterious Threat To World In Steven Spielberg's 'UFO' Film - WATCH
description: Steven Spielberg's upcoming Disclosure Day is already being called the summer sci-fi blockbuster. The movie starring Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Colin Firth, and others, takes the filmmaker back to the alien genre, which blends political thriller with mystery drama.
